reviews.review_title: 3d no longer working in public rooms?
reviews.review_description: 3d movies in public used to work and now doesn’t.    No pc, just my quest 3 and WiFi.    I’ve looked everywhere and can’t find a way to get this back!   Anyone have any ideas on why this stopped working?   I have the latest firmware but can’t remember when this stopped working.    Anyone else??

reviews.review_title: So much potential, but misses the mark
reviews.review_description: This game has been in beta for God knows how long, and it’s still got so many problems. 50% of the community is just weirdos and there’s 🌽 servers anyone (including minors) can access around every corner. On top of that, 3d is busted, Remote Desktop doesn’t work and cloud browser is just a laggy, latency filled mess designed as a money laundering operation. Cant even watch ufc with my friend because of it. This game has such a cool idea, but its execution is very lackluster to say the least

When I try to watch 3d in big screen on meta quest 3 with sbs it's off centered I even tried YouTube in big screen web browser still the same only see if close one my eyes it's like sbs not centered in both eyes

This was probably my #1 app for movies and other fun content in public rooms. The unfortunate update and it's conflicts with this app has broken 3d and been a massive gut punch since 3d content is so enjoyable on here. I encourage everyone to write a review to pressure a fix from developers. 5 stars if they fix it!

I was on Bigscreen for a long time. For about 1 or 2 years. It was really fun I’ll give you that- but moderation really sucks, man.. children in p0rn and g0re rooms (the g0re is freaking traumatizing to some). Children saying the n word left and right or putting an audio that spams it. And mods not banning the people that do that stuff, but the people that have done the tiniest stuff. You shouldn’t get this app, when I got it, I regretted it really bad. I am now involved in a drama that supposedly has police involved. And people who are in the drama are harassing me. The people who are in the drama are mostly adults, and I’m a miner. One adult named art enigma says bad stuff about me and that I ruined her life. I wish I have not ever met her because she has gave me a lot of stress in my life, and her saying that she is tracking me and stuff. If you get Bigscreen, just remember children, 
You will regret it.
Xoxo-Victoria 🫶 hehe

reviews.review_title: 3D is Fault (L/R screen's on wrong sides
reviews.review_description:
3D in Bigscreen beta on Quest 3 is broke ( eye's appear to be swapped to wrong sides). 3D did start to function correctly after i RESET my Quest (HASSLE I DID NOT NEED).
Then it went faulty again after I installed Meta VR Link, VR Desktop & Steam Link. Sorry i don't know which app was the culprit.  I might do a reset and try after each VR app is installed. But I may be a while.
Just this min tried again & the 3D is working again. I started the app from link on this page.

It all  as a dream come true, a social place where we could watch movies with friends! Since the bigscreen beyond project everything has been left behind! Dear developers, please speed up the bit rate. Many of us are willing to pay to improve quality. Otherwise, good luck and don't abandon the best project of watching movies on any VR device.

One of the best things about vr.

I have used this app hundreds if not a thousand times in past 4 years. Its not perfect but it is awesome to watch content on a movie theater size screen. I have hosted hundreds of movies and sports. I never reinstall it needs to be restarted from time to time like every vr app or game out there, or restarted at beginning of use because it did not load right. I wish the stream quality was a little better for guest for me hosting its great. I can watch anything I can play on my pc no exception. This app is many things for me primarily to watch content and I dont care about new environment's I am not looking at the walls or sky while watching content. There are trolls and dim people I block them and move on. Remember almost any online social vr app is the wild west. Its mostly replaced my tv.

Poor moderation has ruined Bigscreen. Many public rooms contain underage users, political and religious shouting matches, and explicit “goon” rooms with no enforcement. The lack of hand tracking and slow development only adds to the problem. What used to be a social movie platform is rapidly becoming VRChat without the tools or moderation to support it

This game is so good but my headset does not have enough time to watch even one movie and the community can be a bit toxic sometimes for example i was watching a minecraft movie and the owner kicked out every single person out of the server with no explanation on what we did
barely functions and screensharing doesnt work
Should be 18+

This used to be an amazing app 
you used to be able to rent movies and watch tv shows. 
it used to have much more of a community feel and you would have the ability to utilize all of the available room environments , but now they've blocked certain features through a pay wall and you can't rent movies anymore. they're even trying to force you to pay to use internet search. unfortunately it seems that every single aspect of our lives has to get worse over the course of the last four or 5 years. no company improves their product any more, the updates only actually make them worse they remove features and they expect you to pay for things that you used to get for free.

Please fix this issue because other than that I enjoy watching movies and going to bible bassed rooms although arguments are common there should be a age limit with restrictions of what you can do on big screen. 😒

reviews.review_title: Great for local files or youtube BUT...
reviews.review_description:
Tldr: it doesn't use widevine L1 DRM so streaming services look like garbage.

it is an amazing app to watch content from local files or youtube and share the theatre experience with friends but if you want to watch stuff from streaming services you'll have to check the seven seas cus the DRM limitations from streaming services stop browsers with less than a L1 certification to play hd content and the app is based on a browser that doesn't have wildvine L1 limiting streaming to SD even if you have a 4k plan on your streaming services... If that gets fixed this could easely be one of the best multimedia players for vr
Easily best way to watch things like Disney+. Even better than the official apps for them!

reviews.review_title: My family and I LOVE BigScreen
reviews.review_description: I don't know HOW this app got anything LESS than 5 stars- my entire house recently got meta quest 3s (fashionably late), and since then, we've barely touched our actual TVs and computers (we're a house FULL of pc gamers, mind you. And we use Big screen in particular to watch shows, YouTube videos, and movies together. LOVE how you can create your own private room JUST for your friends and family. The ability to tilt your screen to allow for watching while lying down is GOLDEN. 5/5 stars.
shocking

perfect omg

reviews.review_title: Not what it used to be
reviews.review_description: Pay wall browser lmao

When it works, I enjoy it, I don't use this app to talk with people, so I don't care about the annoying strangers in rooms that curse and act annoying. I just mute everyone when I join a public room and watch the movie I'm there to see. The experience is great. Watching a 3D movie feels like you're actually in a theater watching it. If you want my advice, avoid the social aspects unless you're with friends that you know.
Your telling me I spend 2$ for a "browser" that cant watch anything on never get this game its a waste of space

Tranfer films onto your headset then access them in Big Screen. Kick back and enjoy. Always enjoyed this app, I've never tried the shared experiences though so can't speak for them

reviews.review_title: Amazing app, but couple of flaws
reviews.review_description: The app overall is amazing and the concept aswell, the only problem is the paywall for the browser and barely any streaming app aside from Amazon prime and Disney+. Also audio glitches with bluetooth headphones, makes the vc deep and distorted. Woul be a straight 5 star if not for these issues.

It looks great but the browser paywall for things like Plex/Jellyfin makes it a rarely used app for me. I will sometimes use it for Prime or YouTube content but I'd rather just sit in the native browser than have a monthly sub for other content. A one off fee, I would consider,  but not $100/Yr.
